creator: stas@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Dec 27, 2010, at 12:46 AM, wen heping <wenheping@gmail.com> wrote:

> 2010/12/27 Stanislav Sedov <stas@freebsd.org>:
>> What is the reason for update?
>> Did you performed regression testing to verify that everything works as
>> expected and there're no regressions?
>=20
> It seems "make validator" is not very good   :(
>=20
It's known not to pass completely, the question is how bad is it compared to=

the previous version.  There's no reason to update it unless it fixes someth=
ing
important.  Guess what people will say and what they will switch to if their=

web application will stop working after the next update being perfectly vali=
d.
That's why for security update we usually backport patches instead of blindl=
y
bumping up the version.

--
ST4096-RIPE=
